alerts.title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B+ at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
alerts.description: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.

alerts.title: Factory hits $1.5B valuation to build AI coding for enterprises
alerts.description: The three-year-old startup raised $150 million led by Khosla Ventures.

alerts.title: OpenAI GPT-5.4-Cyber is More Open Than Claude Mythos
alerts.description: The model could help cybersecurity experts better prepare for attacks.

alerts.title: AI startup Cursor in talks to raise $2 billion funding round at valuation of over $50 billion
alerts.description: Artificial intelligence startup Cursor in talks to raise a $2 billion fundraising round at an over $50 billion valuation, which does not include the investment.

alerts.title: Uber raises stake in Delivery Hero in $318 million deal
alerts.description: Prosus has been forced by European regulators to sell down its Delivery Hero stake in order to proceed with a proposed acquisition of Just Eat.
